ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tracks" (
  "track_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each track */,
  "track_name" TEXT /* Name of the track */,
  "track_uri" TEXT /* URI of the track on the music platform */,
  "album_id" TEXT /* Reference to the album the track belongs to */,
  "disc_number" INTEGER /* Disc number of the track */,
  "track_number" INTEGER /* Track number within the album */,
  "track_duration_ms" INTEGER /* Duration of the track in milliseconds */,
  "track_preview_url" TEXT /* Preview URL for the track */,
  "explicit" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the track contains explicit content */,
  "popularity" INTEGER /* Popularity score of the track */,
  "added_by" TEXT /* User who added the track to the playlist */,
  "added_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the track was added to the playlist */,
  "track_lyrics" TEXT /* Lyrics of the track */,
  "track_tags" TEXT /* Relevant tags or keywords for the track */,
  "track_mood" TEXT /* Mood or atmosphere of the track */,
  "track_tempo" INTEGER /* Tempo of the track in beats per minute (BPM) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("track_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tracks_added_by FOREIGN KEY ("added_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tracks_album_id FOREIGN KEY ("album_id") REFERENCES albums ("album_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "albums" (
  "album_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each album */,
  "album_name" TEXT /* Name of the album */,
  "album_uri" TEXT /* URI of the album on the music platform */,
  "album_artist_id" TEXT /* Reference to the artist(s) of the album */,
  "album_release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the album */,
  "album_image_url" TEXT /* URL of the album image */,
  "album_label" TEXT /* Record label that released the album */,
  "album_producer" TEXT /* Producer(s) of the album */,
  "album_copyright" TEXT /* Copyright information for the album */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("album_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_albums_album_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("album_artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "artists" (
  "artist_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each artist */,
  "artist_name" TEXT /* Name of the artist */,
  "artist_uri" TEXT /* URI of the artist on the music platform */,
  "artist_image_url" TEXT /* URL of the artist image */,
  "artist_bio" TEXT /* Biography of the artist */,
  "artist_genres" TEXT /* Genres associated with the artist */,
  "artist_followers" INTEGER /* Number of followers the artist has */,
  "artist_members" TEXT /* Members of the artist (if it's a group/band) */,
  "artist_influences" TEXT /* Influences or inspirations of the artist */,
  "artist_biography" TEXT /* More detailed biography of the artist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_artists_artist_genres FOREIGN KEY ("artist_genres") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playlists" (
  "playlist_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each playlist */,
  "playlist_name" TEXT /* Name of the playlist */,
  "playlist_description" TEXT /* Description of the playlist */,
  "playlist_image_url" TEXT /* URL of the playlist image */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the playlist */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the playlist was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the playlist was last updated */,
  "followers" INTEGER /* Number of followers the playlist has */,
  "tracks_count" INTEGER /* Number of tracks in the playlist */,
  "playlist_collaborators" TEXT /* Users who contributed to the playlist */,
  "playlist_description_extended" TEXT /* Extended description of the playlist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playlist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tracks_playlists" (
  "tp_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each track-playlist relationship */,
  "playlist_id" TEXT /* Reference to the playlist */,
  "track_id" TEXT /* Reference to the track */,
  "added_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the track was added to the playlist */,
  "added_by" TEXT /* User who added the track to the playlist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tp_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tracks_playlists_playlist_id FOREIGN KEY ("playlist_id") REFERENCES playlists ("playlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tracks_playlists_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("track_id") REFERENCES tracks ("track_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "profile_image_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile image */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "last_active" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last activity */,
  "followers" INTEGER /* Number of followers the user has */,
  "following" INTEGER /* Number of users the user is following */,
  "user_age" INTEGER /* Age of the user */,
  "user_location" TEXT /* Location of the user */,
  "user_preferences" TEXT /* Music preferences of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_playlists" (
  "up_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each user-playlist relationship */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* Reference to the user */,
  "playlist_id" TEXT /* Reference to the playlist */,
  "followed_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user followed the playlist */,
  "playlist_visibility" TEXT /* Visibility of the playlist for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("up_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_playlists_playlist_id FOREIGN KEY ("playlist_id") REFERENCES playlists ("playlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_playlists_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "track_plays" (
  "play_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each play event */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* Reference to the user */,
  "track_id" TEXT /* Reference to the track */,
  "played_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the track was played */,
  "play_duration_ms" INTEGER /* Duration of the play in milliseconds */,
  "play_device" TEXT /* Device used to play the track */,
  "play_location" TEXT /* Location where the track was played */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("play_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_track_plays_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("track_id") REFERENCES tracks ("track_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_track_plays_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "track_shares" (
  "share_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each share event */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* Reference to the user who shared the track */,
  "track_id" TEXT /* Reference to the track */,
  "shared_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the track was shared */,
  "shared_with" TEXT /* User or platform where the track was shared */,
  "share_platform" TEXT /* Platform where the track was shared */,
  "share_message" TEXT /* Message accompanying the shared track */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("share_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_track_shares_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_track_shares_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("track_id") REFERENCES tracks ("track_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_follows" (
  "follow_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each follow event */,
  "follower_id" TEXT /* Reference to the user who is following */,
  "following_id" TEXT /* Reference to the user being followed */,
  "followed_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the follow occurred */,
  "follow_type" TEXT /* Type of follow (e.g., artist, user, playlist, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("follow_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_follows_follower_id FOREIGN KEY ("follower_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_follows_following_id FOREIGN KEY ("following_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the genre */,
  "genre_description_extended" TEXT /* More detailed description of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)
